solutions.solution: (b) As, E‚Üí3, A‚Üí1, T‚Üí8 and C‚Üí2, H‚Üí4, A‚Üí1, E‚Üí3, R‚Üí6. Similarly, T‚Üí8, E‚Üí3, A‚Üí1, C‚Üí2, H‚Üí4, E‚Üí3, R‚Üí6. ‚ąī TEACHER ‚áí 8312436

(c) As, O C A M E L I T O N with positions 2 5 1 6 0 6 7 9 3 and T I R E D positions 4 7 8 6. In these three words each letter is represented by a specific digit. Therefore, E L I T E positions 0 6 7 4 0. Hence, ELITE is coded as 06740.
(d) As, P A T K positions 20 1 12 11. Similarly, P A T N A positions 16 1 20 14 1 with +1 +1 +1 +1 +1, giving 21 2 13 12 and 17 2 21 15 2. ‚ąī PATNA ‚áí 17221152
(d) Each letter is coded with its backward order letter position. As, G R A D U A T E ‚áí 20 9 26 23 6 26 7 22. Similarly, A R I H A N T ‚áí 26 9 18 19 26 13 7. ‚ąī ARIHANT ‚áí 26918192613
(d) Backward order corresponding positions of letters are added. As, P E R F E C T ‚áí 11+22+9+21+22+24+7 = 116. Similarly, C O M P A C T ‚áí 24+12+14+11+26+24+7 = 118. ‚ąī COMPACT ‚áí 118
(b) Backward order letter positions are multiplied. As, T R U E ‚áí 7√ó9√ó6√ó22 = 8316. Similarly, T A P ‚áí 7√ó26√ó11 = 2002. ‚ąī TAP ‚áí 2002
(c) Letters are coded with their backward order letter positions. As, S O N ‚áí 8 12 13 and L I F E ‚áí 15 18 21 22. Similarly, N E V E R ‚áí 13 22 5 22 9. ‚ąī NEVER ‚áí 13225229
(c) Required answer = Sum of the corresponding letter positions. As, J P L ‚áí [9 + 16 + 12] = 37
